name: @storytree/forest-world
description: The shared forest-world RENDER CORE (ADR-0093, strategy C): pure, browser-safe, deterministic geometry — the relaxed Townscaper mesh substrate, the Chaikin-smoothed coastline, longest-path ranking, hex math and sizing — that both the studio (React) and the public website (string-SVG) render FROM. Data-in → geometry-out; no store, no React, no live data, no node: imports. A foundational root organism (ADR-0068 / ADR-0075): owns its own minimal input contract and depends on nothing.
